title: caluera vulpina
intro: Caluera vulpina, also known as caluera or wolf's bane, is a flowering plant in the gentian family native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of caluera vulpina include relief from pain, fever, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Caluera vulpina can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal remedies to treat a range of ailments.
